name: USD Clicker
short_description: The most simple clicker game with endless USD cash
detailed_description:
USD Clicker is a simple clicker game where your only goal is to make as much money as you can. Click anywhere to generate USD. That's it.

There are no upgrades or prestige system like in other idle clicker games. You can only click, earn money and update your rank in the global leaderboard.

Features:
  • Super simpified clicker gameplay
  • No upgrades and powerups
  • Generate as much money as you want
  • Cool in-game cash physics
  • Changeable background color
  • Steam achievements
  • Global leaderboard to compete with other players

💵 Buy it now and get 2 USD back for free! 💵
